Bash(python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)

from shaclex_py.parser.shacl_parser import parse_shacl_file
from shaclex_py.converter.shacl_to_canonical import convert_shacl_to_canonical
from shaclex_py.serializer.json_serializer import serialize_json
from shaclex_py.parser.json_parser import parse_canonical
from shaclex_py.converter.canonical_to_shacl import convert_canonical_to_shacl
from shaclex_py.serializer.shacl_serializer import serialize_shacl

shacl1 = parse_shacl_file\('shex_to_shacl/Person.ttl'\)
canonical1 = convert_shacl_to_canonical\(shacl1\)
json_str = serialize_json\(canonical1\)
canonical2 = parse_canonical\(json_str\)
shacl2 = convert_canonical_to_shacl\(canonical2\)

print\('Original properties \(27\):'\)
for p in shacl2.shapes[0].properties:
    path = p.path.iri.value.split\('/'\)[-1].split\('#'\)[-1]
    constraint = p.datatype or p.class_ or p.has_value or p.node_kind or p.pattern or p.node or p.or_constraints
    if p.has_value:
        print\(f'  PATH={path} hasValue={p.has_value} min={p.min_count} max={p.max_count}'\)
    elif p.node_kind:
        print\(f'  PATH={path} nodeKind={p.node_kind}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)

from shaclex_py.parser.shacl_parser import parse_shacl_file
from shaclex_py.converter.shacl_to_canonical import convert_shacl_to_canonical
from shaclex_py.serializer.json_serializer import serialize_json
from shaclex_py.parser.json_parser import parse_canonical
from shaclex_py.converter.canonical_to_shacl import convert_canonical_to_shacl
from shaclex_py.serializer.shacl_serializer import serialize_shacl
import rdflib
from rdflib.compare import isomorphic

shacl0 = parse_shacl_file\('shex_to_shacl/Person.ttl'\)
ttl0 = serialize_shacl\(shacl0\)

def round_trip\(ttl\):
    shacl = rdflib.Graph\(\).parse\(data=ttl, format='turtle'\)
    shacl_parsed = __import__\('shaclex_py.parser.shacl_parser', fromlist=['parse_shacl']\).parse_shacl\(ttl\)
    canonical = convert_shacl_to_canonical\(shacl_parsed\)
    json_str = serialize_json\(canonical\)
    canonical2 = parse_canonical\(json_str\)
    shacl2 = convert_canonical_to_shacl\(canonical2\)
    return serialize_shacl\(shacl2\)

ttl1 = round_trip\(ttl0\)
ttl2 = round_trip\(ttl1\)

g0 = rdflib.Graph\(\).parse\(data=ttl0, format='turtle'\)
g1 = rdflib.Graph\(\).parse\(data=ttl1, format='turtle'\)
g2 = rdflib.Graph\(\).parse\(data=ttl2, format='turtle'\)

print\(f'Original:       {len\(g0\)} triples'\)
print\(f'After 1st trip: {len\(g1\)} triples  | isomorphic to original? {isomorphic\(g0, g1\)}'\)
print\(f'After 2nd trip: {len\(g2\)} triples  | isomorphic to 1st?      {isomorphic\(g1, g2\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
